agent_results.root_cause: Bandwidth at 9765.6 KB/s. Large file transfers or streaming sessions are saturating the network.
agent_results.immediate_action: Rate-limit per-client bandwidth. Prioritize control traffic over bulk data.
preventive_measures: Separate bulk transfer traffic to a dedicated network interface.
Cache frequently downloaded files at the edge.
